text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh? Are you going out today, Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes. I'm taking a trip to Kyoto.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove, otherwise known as the Empress, is
Fine Motion's roommate.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Kyoto?! How splendid! Are you making the trip to
taste their udon?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm not nearly the gourmand that you are.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to spectate a G1 race—The Queen
Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: The Queen Elizabeth II Cup...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, I've never seen it in person. Is that
race special to you?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's one of the most important races in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's a noble and honorable race... One that
demands the utmost respect.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Just running there is something to be proud of.
And then, you can feel the deep respect the
crowd has for the one who wins it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I've run there before. It was a bitter defeat, but
still a beautiful memory for me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Even now, I can vividly recall how I felt, vying for
victory in that race.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
They're broadcasting the race on TV as well, so
you should watch it. It's quite the stately and
elegant affair, so I imagine you'd find it
interesting.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Right, well, I'm off now.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, Groove!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Bring me back something salty, okay? ♪ See you
when you get back!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...So, would you like to watch the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup with me?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's settled, then! Hehe, I'm so excited! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so we watch the Queen Elizabeth II Cup,
which turns into a truly intense battle!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
What drive! What passion! This is turning into the
fight of the season! And... three racers have
crossed the finish line simultaneously! It's a photo
finish!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd in the stands erupts as the
Umamusume cross the finish line together, almost
as if it had been planned in advance.

text_block_list.name: Cheers from the TV
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What an exquisite race!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Everyone was truly remarkable. Their desire for
victory was positively palpable.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I was only watching, but my heart was in my
throat the whole time.
choice_data_list: Sounds like their desire was infectious.
Sounds like their desire was infectious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One can't hope to enter a G1 race with just
ordinary effort. All the hardest-working racers
gather at those races, and only one can claim first
place.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Groove said that she remembers running there
vividly even now.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The Queen Elizabeth II Cup... There's something
special about it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: The desire for victory...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion quietly mutters these words.
However, I'm unable to read exactly what
emotion is welling up within her.
